title: Manufacturing steps sheet of LVL (micro-laminated wood) of beech (Fagus sylvatica)
author: Villanueva, José Luis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A new LVL using Spanish beech veneers has been developed, offering improved strength and stiffness compared to sawn timber. Tests show superior mechanical properties and tensile strength exceeding EN338 standards.
steps_raw: A new LVL using Spanish beech veneers has been developed, offering improved strength and stiffness compared to sawn timber. Tests show superior mechanical properties and tensile strength exceeding EN338 standards.
